title: shake it!
artist: emon(Tes.) ft. Hatsune Miku, Kagamine Rin & Len

lines.ja: 寂しくて切ない一人の夜には
lines.en: On those lonely, aching nights spent alone

lines.ja: 消えたい言葉を捜して
lines.en: I go hunting for the words I want to erase

lines.ja: 秘密のドアを抜けてきて　here we go
lines.en: Slip through the secret door — here we go

lines.ja: oh yeah oh yeah
lines.en: oh yeah, oh yeah

lines.ja: 目の前の扉を開ければ
lines.en: Push open the door right in front of you and

lines.ja: そう、終わりのない夜への始まりだ
lines.en: that's it — the start of a night with no end

lines.ja: 気球状のフロアの影から
lines.en: From the shadow of a hot-air-balloon-shaped floor

lines.ja: 四次元への旅が始まるよ
lines.en: a journey into the fourth dimension begins

lines.ja: 流星の箱舟に乗って
lines.en: Hop aboard the shooting-star ark

lines.ja: さぁ　時空旅行へと進んでいくのさ
lines.en: and off we go — a trip through time and space

lines.ja: 天気予報は当てにならないから
lines.en: The forecast is never to be trusted, so

lines.ja: 気の向くまま　all right
lines.en: just follow your mood — all right

lines.ja: Today is All night be
lines.en: Today is all night — be

lines.ja: funky funky funky night
lines.en: funky funky funky night

lines.ja: You & I be together
lines.en: You & I be together

lines.ja: funky funky funky night

lines.ja: Today is All night be

lines.en: funky funky funky night

lines.ja: You & I funky night!
lines.en: You & I — funky night!

lines.ja: あげ↑てきな　Dance Dance
lines.en: Turn it up↑! Dance, Dance

lines.ja: 君の瞳から　輝く金の流星が
lines.en: A shining golden shooting star from your eyes

lines.ja: 秘密のドアを抜けてきて　here we go
lines.en: Slip through the secret door — here we go

lines.ja: oh yeah oh yeah　yeah yeah yeah
lines.en: oh yeah, oh yeah, yeah yeah yeah

lines.ja: shake shake　今夜は止まらない
lines.en: shake shake — tonight we can't stop

lines.ja: だから今は　oh　夢の中
lines.en: so right now — oh — we're in a dream

lines.ja: ミラーボールが回りまわる　hurry up
lines.en: the mirror ball keeps spinning and spinning — hurry up

lines.ja: oh yeah oh yeah　yeah yeah yeah
lines.en: oh yeah, oh yeah, yeah yeah yeah

lines.ja: Dance Dance　君の瞳から…
lines.en: Dance, Dance — from your eyes…
